import * as component_1 from '@kne/current-lib_table-view';
import '@kne/current-lib_table-view/dist/index.css';
import * as component_3 from 'antd';
import '@kne/current-lib_table-view/dist/index.css';
import '@kne/current-lib_table-view/dist/index.css';
import '@kne/current-lib_table-view/dist/index.css';
import '@kne/current-lib_table-view/dist/index.css';
const readmeConfig = {
    name: `table-view`,
    summary: `<p><code>@kne/table-view</code> 是一个基于 React 和 Ant Design 的表格视图组件库，提供轻量灵活的 CSS Grid 表格布局，以及列渲染、格式化、排序、行选择等开箱即用的能力。组件库从 <code>@kne/table-page</code> 中独立拆分，专注于表格视图层与列渲染体系，可单独使用，也可被 <code>TablePage</code>、<code>Table</code> 等上层组件集成。</p>
<h3>核心组件</h3>
<h4>TableView</h4>
<p>基于 CSS Grid 的表格视图组件，以栅格布局实现表头与表体的对齐展示。相比于 antd <code>Table</code>，它更轻量灵活，适合需要自定义渲染、移动端适配或卡片式表格场景。支持：</p>
<ul>
<li>基于 24 栅格的列宽分配（<code>span</code> 属性）与固定宽度（<code>width</code>）</li>
<li>CSS Grid 自动布局，内容超出时自动撑开</li>
<li>行选择（checkbox 多选 / radio 单选）</li>
<li>行点击事件与自定义 <code>render</code> 拆分表头/表体</li>
<li>通过 <code>sortRender</code> 配合 <code>useSort</code> 实现表头排序</li>
</ul>
<h3>核心 Hooks</h3>
<h4>useSelectedRow</h4>
<p>行选择 Hook，支持多选（checkbox）和单选（radio）两种模式。提供 <code>getRowSelection(dataSource)</code> 生成标准 <code>rowSelection</code> 配置，以及 <code>selectedRowKeys</code>、<code>selectedRows</code>、<code>clearSelectedRows</code> 等状态管理能力。</p>
<h4>useSort</h4>
<p>排序 Hook，配合 <code>TableView</code> 的 <code>sortRender</code> 实现表头排序交互。支持单列排序与多列排序，排序状态循环切换：DESC → ASC → 取消。提供 <code>sortDataSource</code> 工具函数用于本地排序（包含中文排序）。</p>
<h3>列渲染类型系统</h3>
<p>通过 <code>renderType</code> 属性，可以用声明式的方式定义列的渲染样式，无需手写 <code>render</code> 函数。内置 <code>main</code>、<code>amount</code>、<code>tag</code>、<code>status</code>、<code>tagList</code>、<code>list</code>、<code>options</code>、<code>description</code>、<code>enum</code> 等类型，并支持与 <code>short</code> / <code>small</code> / <code>large</code> 尺寸修饰组合。</p>
<p>配合 <code>format</code> 属性可实现日期、金额、布尔值等展示格式化；配合 <code>getValueOf</code> 可传入 render 所需的复杂数据结构。</p>
<h3>工具函数</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>导出项</th>
<th>说明</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>computeColumnsValue</code> / <code>computeDisplay</code></td>
<td>列值计算与展示渲染</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>formatView</code> / <code>defaultFormat</code></td>
<td>声明式值格式化</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>resolveColumns</code> / <code>resolveColumn</code></td>
<td>列配置解析，自动注入 renderType 对应的 render 与宽度</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>preset</code> / <code>globalParams</code></td>
<td>全局参数预设，定制 renderType 映射与标签颜色</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>getTagColor</code> / <code>renderTagItem</code> / <code>renderTagList</code></td>
<td>Tag 渲染工具</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>getStatusType</code> / <code>renderStatusItem</code></td>
<td>Status 渲染工具</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h3>使用场景</h3>
<ul>
<li><strong>详情页信息展示</strong>：在 InfoPage 等场景中展示结构化数据列表</li>
<li><strong>轻量列表页</strong>：不需要 antd Table 复杂能力时的简洁表格</li>
<li><strong>移动端适配</strong>：栅格式布局更适合窄屏展示</li>
<li><strong>自定义表格渲染</strong>：通过 <code>render</code> 属性拆分表头与表体，灵活组合布局</li>
<li><strong>列渲染复用</strong>：<code>renderType</code> 体系统一 tag、status、amount 等常见列样式</li>
</ul>`,
    description: `A React table view component with column rendering, computed columns, formatting and sorting utilities`,
    packageName: `@kne/table-view`,
    api: `<h3>TableView</h3>

</tr>

<tr>

<td><code>'id'</code></td>

</tr>
<tr>

</tr>

</tr>

</tr>

</tr>
<tr>
<td>empty</td>
<td>ReactNode</td>
<td><code>&lt;Empty /&gt;</code></td>

<tr>
<td>headerStyle</td>
<td>object</td>
<td>-</td>
<td>表头自定义样式，仅在 <code>render</code> 自定义渲染时作用于 <code>header</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>onRowSelect</td>

<tr>

<tr>

</tbody>
</table>

</tr>

<td>string</td>

</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h4>示例</h4>
<pre><code class="language-jsx">&lt;TableView
  dataSource={dataSource}
  columns={[
    { name: 'id', title: '订单编号', width: 160, renderType: 'small' },
    { name: 'customerName', title: '客户名称', renderType: 'main' },
    { name: 'amount', title: '金额', renderType: 'amount', format: 'number-style:decimal-suffix:元' }
  ]}
  rowSelection={{
    type: 'checkbox',
    selectedRowKeys,
    onChange: setSelectedRowKeys
  }}
/&gt;
</code></pre>
<p>完整示例见文档 <code>TableView</code>。</p>
<h3>useSelectedRow</h3>
<p>行选择 Hook，用于配合 <code>TableView</code> 的 <code>rowSelection</code>。</p>
<h4>参数</h4>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>属性</th>
<th>类型</th>
<th>默认值</th>
<th>说明</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>rowKey</td>
<td>string | function</td>
<td><code>'id'</code></td>
<td>行唯一标识</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>type</td>
<td><code>'checkbox'</code> | <code>'radio'</code></td>
<td><code>'checkbox'</code></td>
<td>选择类型</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h4>返回值</h4>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>属性</th>
<th>类型</th>
<th>说明</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>selectedRowKeys</td>
<td>array</td>
<td>已选行 key 列表</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>selectedRows</td>
<td>array</td>
<td>已选行数据</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>onSelect</td>
<td>function</td>
<td><code>(item, checked) =&gt; void</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>onSelectAll</td>
<td>function</td>
<td><code>(checked, selected, items) =&gt; void</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>setSelectedRows</td>
<td>function</td>
<td>直接设置已选行数据</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>setSelectedRowKeys</td>
<td>function</td>
<td><code>(keys, dataSource) =&gt; void</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>clearSelectedRows</td>
<td>function</td>
<td>清空选择</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>getRowSelection</td>
<td>function</td>
<td><code>(dataSource, extra?) =&gt; rowSelection</code> 生成 <code>rowSelection</code> 配置</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h4>示例</h4>
<pre><code class="language-jsx">const { selectedRowKeys, selectedRows, getRowSelection, clearSelectedRows } = TableView.useSelectedRow({ rowKey: 'id' });

&lt;TableView
  dataSource={dataSource}
  columns={columns}
  rowSelection={getRowSelection(dataSource)}
/&gt;;
</code></pre>
<p>完整示例见文档 <code>useSelectedRow</code>。</p>
<h3>useSort</h3>
<p>排序 Hook，配合 <code>TableView</code> 的 <code>sortRender</code> 实现表头排序。</p>
<h4>参数</h4>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>属性</th>
<th>类型</th>
<th>默认值</th>
<th>说明</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>sort</td>
<td>array</td>
<td>-</td>
<td>受控排序值 <code>[{ name, sort: 'ASC' | 'DESC' }]</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>defaultSort</td>
<td>array</td>
<td><code>[]</code></td>
<td>默认排序</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>onSortChange</td>
<td>function</td>
<td>-</td>
<td>排序变化回调 <code>(sort) =&gt; void</code></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h4>返回值</h4>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>属性</th>
<th>类型</th>
<th>说明</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>sort</td>
<td>array</td>
<td>当前排序配置</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>setSort</td>
<td>function</td>
<td>设置排序</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>sortRender</td>
<td>function</td>
<td><code>({ name, single }) =&gt; ReactNode</code>，传给 TableView</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h4>columns.sort</h4>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>值</th>
<th>说明</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>true</code></td>
<td>开启排序，默认单列模式</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>{ single: true }</code></td>
<td>单列排序，切换列时清除其他列</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>{ single: false }</code></td>
<td>多列排序</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h4>sortDataSource</h4>
<p>本地排序工具函数：<code>sortDataSource(dataSource, sort, columns)</code>。支持数字排序与中文 <code>localeCompare</code> 排序，空值始终排在末尾。</p>
<h4>示例</h4>
<pre><code class="language-jsx">const { sort, sortRender } = TableView.useSort({ onSortChange: console.log });
const sortedData = useMemo(() =&gt; TableView.sortDataSource(dataSource, sort, columns), [sort, dataSource]);

&lt;TableView dataSource={sortedData} columns={columns} sortRender={sortRender} /&gt;;
</code></pre>
<p>完整示例见文档 <code>useSort</code>。</p>
<h3>renderType</h3>
<p>通过 <code>columns.renderType</code> 声明列的渲染方式，无需手写 <code>render</code>。可与尺寸修饰词组合。</p>
<h4>内置类型</h4>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>类型</th>
<th>说明</th>
<th>默认宽度</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>main</code></td>
<td>主信息列，支持 <code>primary</code> / <code>hover</code> / <code>onClick</code>，自动省略</td>
<td>300px</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>amount</code></td>
<td>金额列，右对齐，自动省略</td>
<td>140px</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>options</code></td>
<td>操作列，铺满单元格，配合 <code>@kne/button-group</code></td>
<td>180px</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>enum</code></td>
<td>枚举值渲染，映射为 Tag</td>
<td>140px</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>tag</code></td>
<td>单个 Tag，<code>getValueOf</code> 返回 <code>{ type, text }</code></td>
<td>140px</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>status</code></td>
<td>状态 Badge，<code>getValueOf</code> 返回 <code>{ type, text }</code></td>
<td>100px</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>tagList</code></td>
<td>多个 Tag 列表</td>
<td>300px</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>list</code></td>
<td>文本列表，可用 <code>split</code> 指定分隔符</td>
<td>200px</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>description</code></td>
<td>长文本描述列，自动省略</td>
<td>400px</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h4>尺寸修饰词</h4>
<p>可与类型组合，如 <code>tag-short</code>、<code>status-small</code>、<code>main-large</code>：</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>修饰词</th>
<th>说明</th>
<th>宽度</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>short</code></td>
<td>缩短列宽</td>
<td>120px</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>small</code></td>
<td>最小列宽</td>
<td>100px</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>large</code></td>
<td>放大列宽</td>
<td>300px</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h4>options 列按钮配置</h4>
<p><code>getValueOf</code> 返回按钮配置数组，每项支持：</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>属性</th>
<th>类型</th>
<th>说明</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>children</td>
<td>ReactNode</td>
<td>按钮文案</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>onClick</td>
<td>function</td>
<td>点击回调</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>isDelete</td>
<td>boolean</td>
<td>是否为删除操作（弹出确认）</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>message</td>
<td>string</td>
<td>删除确认文案</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>hidden</td>
<td>boolean</td>
<td>是否隐藏</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>完整示例见文档 <code>renderType</code>。</p>
<h3>format</h3>
<p>通过 <code>columns.format</code> 声明式格式化展示值，支持链式组合（空格分隔多个格式化器）。</p>
<h4>内置格式化器</h4>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>名称</th>
<th>参数</th>
<th>说明</th>
<th>示例</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>date</code></td>
<td>模板</td>
<td>日期格式化</td>
<td><code>format: 'date'</code> 或 <code>format: 'date-YYYY/MM/DD'</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>datetime</code></td>
<td>模板</td>
<td>日期时间格式化</td>
<td><code>format: 'datetime'</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>dateRange</code></td>
<td>模板, allow</td>
<td>日期范围</td>
<td><code>format: 'dateRange-YYYY-MM-DD-allow'</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>boolean</code></td>
<td>trueValue</td>
<td>布尔值转是/否</td>
<td><code>format: 'boolean'</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>number</code></td>
<td>见下方</td>
<td>数字格式化</td>
<td><code>format: 'number-style:decimal-suffix:元'</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>money</code></td>
<td>单位</td>
<td>金额拼接</td>
<td><code>format: 'money-元'</code></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h4>number 格式化参数</h4>
<p>通过 <code>calcArgs</code> 解析，格式为 <code>number-style:decimal-maximumFractionDigits:0-useGrouping:true-suffix:元</code>：</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>参数</th>
<th>类型</th>
<th>默认值</th>
<th>说明</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>style</td>
<td>string</td>
<td><code>'decimal'</code></td>
<td>Intl 数字样式</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>unit</td>
<td>number</td>
<td><code>1</code></td>
<td>除数</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>maximumFractionDigits</td>
<td>number</td>
<td><code>2</code></td>
<td>最大小数位</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>useGrouping</td>
<td>boolean</td>
<td><code>true</code></td>
<td>是否使用千分位</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>roundingMode</td>
<td>string</td>
<td><code>'halfExpand'</code></td>
<td>舍入模式</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>suffix</td>
<td>string</td>
<td><code>''</code></td>
<td>后缀</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>也可传入函数：<code>format: (value, { dataSource, column, context }) =&gt; string</code>。</p>
<h3>preset / globalParams</h3>
<p>全局参数预设，用于定制 renderType 映射、列宽与标签颜色。</p>
<pre><code class="language-jsx">import { preset } from '@kne/table-view';

preset({
  renderTypeSize: {
    main: { width: 400, min: 200, max: 600 }
  },
  tagTypeColors: {
    custom: '#1890ff'
  },
  statusTypeColors: {
    custom: '#52c41a'
  }
});
</code></pre>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>属性</th>
<th>类型</th>
<th>说明</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>renderType</td>
<td>object</td>
<td>自定义 renderType 映射</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>renderTypeSize</td>
<td>object</td>
<td>覆盖内置类型的 width / min / max</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>tagTypeColors</td>
<td>object</td>
<td>Tag 颜色映射</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>statusTypeColors</td>
<td>object</td>
<td>Status 颜色映射</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h3>列解析工具</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>函数</th>
<th>说明</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>resolveColumns(columns)</code></td>
<td>批量解析列配置，自动注入 render、width、ellipsis 等</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>resolveColumn(column)</code></td>
<td>解析单个列配置</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>parseRenderType(renderType)</code></td>
<td>解析 renderType 字符串，返回 <code>{ type, size }</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>resolveRenderType(renderType)</code></td>
<td>解析 renderType 并返回完整维度信息</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>getColumnRender(column)</code></td>
<td>获取列的 render 函数</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>getRenderTypeNames()</code></td>
<td>获取所有已注册的 renderType 名称</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>isOptionsColumn(column)</code></td>
<td>判断是否为操作列</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h3>列值计算</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>函数</th>
<th>说明</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>computeColumnsValue(options)</code></td>
<td>计算列值，处理 format、display、空值等</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>computeDisplay(options)</code></td>
<td>根据列值渲染展示内容</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>computeColumnsDisplay(options)</code></td>
<td>批量计算并渲染列展示内容</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p><code>computeColumnsValue</code> 参数：</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>属性</th>
<th>类型</th>
<th>默认值</th>
<th>说明</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>columns</td>
<td>array</td>
<td>-</td>
<td>列配置</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>dataSource</td>
<td>object</td>
<td>-</td>
<td>行数据</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>context</td>
<td>object</td>
<td>-</td>
<td>渲染上下文</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>emptyIsPlaceholder</td>
<td>boolean</td>
<td>-</td>
<td>空值是否显示占位符</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>valueIsEmpty</td>
<td>function</td>
<td>-</td>
<td>空值判断函数</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>placeholder</td>
<td>string</td>
<td>-</td>
<td>占位符</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>removeEmpty</td>
<td>boolean</td>
<td><code>true</code></td>
<td>是否过滤 display 为 false 的列</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h3>渲染工具</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>函数</th>
<th>说明</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>renderCellContent(content, column, className)</code></td>
<td>渲染单元格内容</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>getColumnEllipsis(column)</code></td>
<td>获取列的 ellipsis 配置</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>wrapColumnHeaderTitle(title)</code></td>
<td>包装表头标题，支持省略</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>renderColumnTitle(title, column, sortRender)</code></td>
<td>渲染带排序的表头标题</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>getTagColor(type)</code></td>
<td>获取 Tag 颜色</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>renderTagItem(value)</code></td>
<td>渲染单个 Tag</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>renderTagList(value)</code></td>
<td>渲染 Tag 列表</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>getStatusType(type)</code></td>
<td>获取 Status 类型</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>renderStatusItem(value)</code></td>
<td>渲染 Status</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h3>列宽工具</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>函数</th>
<th>说明</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>parseColumnWidth(width)</code></td>
<td>解析列宽值为数字（px）</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>getColumnLayout(column, options)</code></td>
<td>获取列布局信息（widthBased、fillRemaining、style）</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>getGridTemplateColumns(columns, options)</code></td>
<td>生成 CSS Grid 模板列</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>hasColumnSpan(column)</code></td>
<td>是否设置了 span</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>hasColumnWidth(column, columns)</code></td>
<td>是否设置了 width</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h3>常量</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>常量</th>
<th>说明</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>RENDER_TYPE_NAMES</code></td>
<td>所有 renderType 名称数组</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>SIZE_NAMES</code></td>
<td>尺寸修饰词数组 <code>['short', 'small', 'large']</code></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>`,
    example: {
        isFull: false,
        className: ``,
        style: ``,
        list: [{
    title: `TableView`,
    description: `表格视图组件，支持行选择、列宽设置、自定义渲染等`,
    code: `const { TableView } = _TableView;
const { Flex, Tag, Card, Button } = antd;
const { useState } = React;

const orderStatusMap = {
  已完成: { type: 'success', text: '已完成' },
  处理中: { type: 'processing', text: '处理中' },
  待发货: { type: 'warning', text: '待发货' },
  已取消: { type: 'default', text: '已取消' }
};

const dataSource = [
  {
    id: 'ORD20240115001',
    customerName: '深圳市腾讯计算机系统有限公司',
    contact: '张三',
    phone: '13800138000',
    amount: 42500,
    status: '已完成',
    orderDate: '2024-01-15',
    deliveryDate: '2024-01-17'
  },
  {
    id: 'ORD20240115002',
    customerName: '华为技术有限公司',
    contact: '李四',
    phone: '13900149000',
    amount: 85000,
    status: '处理中',
    orderDate: '2024-01-15',
    deliveryDate: '2024-01-20'
  },
  {
    id: 'ORD20240115003',
    customerName: '阿里巴巴集团控股有限公司',
    contact: '王五',
    phone: '13700157000',
    amount: 120000,
    status: '待发货',
    orderDate: '2024-01-14',
    deliveryDate: '2024-01-22'
  },
  {
    id: 'ORD20240115004',
    customerName: '北京字节跳动科技有限公司',
    contact: '赵六',
    phone: '13600166000',
    amount: 65000,
    status: '已完成',
    orderDate: '2024-01-13',
    deliveryDate: '2024-01-16'
  },
  {
    id: 'ORD20240115005',
    customerName: '百度在线网络技术（北京）有限公司',
    contact: '钱七',
    phone: '13500175000',
    amount: 95000,
    status: '已取消',
    orderDate: '2024-01-12',
    deliveryDate: ''
  }
];

const columns = [
  { name: 'id', title: '订单编号', width: 180, renderType: 'small' },
  { name: 'customerName', title: '客户名称', span: 10, renderType: 'main' },
  { name: 'contact', title: '联系人', width: 80 },
  { name: 'phone', title: '联系电话', width: '130px', render: value => value.replace(/(\d{3})(\d{4})(\d{4})/, '\$1-\$2-\$3') },
  {
    name: 'amount',
    title: '订单金额(元)',
    renderType: 'amount',
    format: 'number-style:decimal-maximumFractionDigits:0-useGrouping:true-suffix:元'
  },
  { name: 'orderDate', title: '下单日期', format: 'date' },
  { name: 'deliveryDate', title: '预计送达', format: 'date' },
  {
    name: 'status',
    title: '订单状态',
    width: 100,
    renderType: 'status',
    getValueOf: item => orderStatusMap[item.status] || { type: 'default', text: item.status }
  }
];

const WithCheckbox = () => {
  const [selectKeys, setSelectKeys] = useState([]);
  const totalAmount = selectKeys.reduce((sum, id) => sum + (dataSource.find(d => d.id === id)?.amount || 0), 0);
  return (
    <div>
      <Flex justify="space-between" align="center" style={{ marginBottom: 12 }}>
        <span>
          已选 <strong>{selectKeys.length}</strong> 个订单，总金额 <strong style={{ color: '#52c41a' }}>¥{totalAmount.toLocaleString()}</strong>
        </span>
      </Flex>
      <TableView
        dataSource={dataSource}
        columns={columns}
        rowSelection={{
          type: 'checkbox',
          allowSelectedAll: true,
          selectedRowKeys: selectKeys,
          onChange: setSelectKeys
        }}
      />
    </div>
  );
};

const WithRadio = () => {
  const [selectKeys, setSelectKeys] = useState([]);
  const selectedOrder = dataSource.find(d => d.id === selectKeys[0]);
  const radioColumns = [
    { name: 'id', title: '订单编号', width: 160, renderType: 'small' },
    { name: 'customerName', title: '客户名称', renderType: 'main' },
    {
      name: 'amount',
      title: '订单金额(元)',
      width: 120,
      renderType: 'amount',
      format: 'number-style:decimal-maximumFractionDigits:0-useGrouping:true-suffix:元'
    },
    {
      name: 'status',
      title: '订单状态',
      width: 100,
      renderType: 'status',
      getValueOf: item => orderStatusMap[item.status] || { type: 'default', text: item.status }
    }
  ];
  return (
    <div>
      <div style={{ marginBottom: 8, color: '#666' }}>单选 — 左侧为 Radio 选择列</div>
      <Flex justify="space-between" align="center" style={{ marginBottom: 12 }}>
        <span>已选订单：{selectedOrder ? \`\${selectedOrder.id} (\${selectedOrder.customerName})\` : '无'}</span>
        {selectedOrder && <Tag color="blue">¥{selectedOrder.amount.toLocaleString()}</Tag>}
      </Flex>
      <TableView
        dataSource={dataSource}
        columns={radioColumns}
        rowSelection={{
          type: 'radio',
          selectedRowKeys: selectKeys,
          onChange: setSelectKeys
        }}
      />
    </div>
  );
};

const WithCustomRender = () => {
  const displayData = dataSource.slice(0, 3);
  const totalAmount = displayData.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.amount, 0);

  return (
    <Card
      size="small"
      title="近期订单"
      extra={
        <Button type="link" size="small" onClick={() => console.log('查看全部')}>
          查看全部
        </Button>
      }
      styles={{ body: { padding: 0 } }}
    >
      <Flex
        justify="space-between"
        align="center"
        style={{ padding: '12px 16px', background: '#fafafa', borderBottom: '1px solid #f0f0f0' }}
      >
        <Flex gap={8} align="center">
          <Tag color="blue">{displayData.length} 笔</Tag>
          <span style={{ color: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.65)', fontSize: 13 }}>
            合计 <strong style={{ color: '#52c41a' }}>¥{totalAmount.toLocaleString()}</strong>
          </span>
        </Flex>
        <span style={{ color: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.45)', fontSize: 12 }}>render 自定义外层布局</span>
      </Flex>
      <TableView
        dataSource={displayData}
        columns={columns}
        render={({ renderBody }) => (
          <div style={{ overflowX: 'auto' }}>{renderBody(displayData)}</div>
        )}
      />
    </Card>
  );
};

const WithEmpty = () => (
  <TableView
    dataSource={[]}
    columns={columns}
    empty={
      <div style={{ padding: 24, color: '#999' }}>
        暂无订单数据
      </div>
    }
  />
);

const BaseExample = () => {
  return (
    <Flex vertical gap={24}>
      <div style={{ background: '#f5f5f5', padding: '12px', borderRadius: '8px' }}>
        订单列表 - 共 <strong>{dataSource.length}</strong> 个订单
      </div>
      <TableView dataSource={dataSource} columns={columns} />
      <WithCheckbox />
      <WithRadio />
      <WithCustomRender />
      <WithEmpty />
    </Flex>
  );
};

render(<BaseExample />);

`,
    scope: [{
    name: "_TableView",
    packageName: "@kne/current-lib_table-view",
    importStatement: "import * as _TableView from \"@kne/table-view\"",
    component: component_1
},{
    name: "antd",
    packageName: "antd",
    component: component_3
}]
},{
    title: `renderType`,
    description: `列 renderType 配置：main / amount / tag / status / tagList / list / options / description / enum，支持与 short / small / large 尺寸修饰组合`,
    code: `const { TableView } = _TableView;
const { Flex } = antd;

const statusMap = {
  待发货: { type: 'warning', text: '待发货' },
  处理中: { type: 'processing', text: '处理中' },
  已完成: { type: 'success', text: '已完成' }
};

const categoryMap = {
  企业客户: { type: 'default', text: '企业客户' },
  战略客户: { type: 'processing', text: '战略客户' }
};

const dataSource = [
  {
    id: 'ORD001',
    customerName: '深圳市腾讯计算机系统有限公司',
    category: '企业客户',
    tags: ['物流', '加急'],
    keywords: ['合同', '附件', '春节前'],
    remark: '客户要求春节前完成交付，需协调物流加急处理，并同步更新合同附件。',
    amount: 42500,
    status: '待发货'
  },
  {
    id: 'ORD002',
    customerName: '华为技术有限公司',
    category: '战略客户',
    tags: ['评审', '配置清单'],
    keywords: ['需求评审', '配置清单'],
    remark: '项目处于需求评审阶段，待客户确认最终配置清单后安排发货。',
    amount: 85000,
    status: '处理中'
  },
  {
    id: 'ORD003',
    customerName: '阿里巴巴集团控股有限公司',
    category: '企业客户',
    tags: ['拣货', '付款完成'],
    keywords: ['付款', '拣货', '发货'],
    remark: '已完成付款，仓库正在拣货，预计两个工作日内发出第一批货物。',
    amount: 120000,
    status: '已完成'
  }
];

const columns = [
  { name: 'id', title: '编号', renderType: 'small' },
  {
    name: 'customerName',
    title: '客户名称',
    renderType: 'main',
    primary: true,
    hover: true,
    onClick: ({ item }) => console.log('查看客户详情:', item)
  },
  {
    name: 'category',
    title: '分类',
    renderType: 'tag-short',
    getValueOf: item => categoryMap[item.category]
  },
  {
    name: 'tags',
    title: '标签',
    renderType: 'tagList',
    getValueOf: item =>
      (item.tags || []).map(text => ({
        type: text === '加急' ? 'error' : 'processing',
        text
      }))
  },
  {
    name: 'keywords',
    title: '关键词',
    renderType: 'list',
    split: '、',
    getValueOf: item => item.keywords
  },
  { name: 'remark', title: '备注', renderType: 'description' },
  {
    name: 'amount',
    title: '金额',
    renderType: 'amount',
    format: 'number-style:decimal-maximumFractionDigits:0-useGrouping:true-suffix:元'
  },
  {
    name: 'status',
    title: '状态',
    renderType: 'status',
    getValueOf: item => statusMap[item.status]
  },
  {
    name: 'options',
    title: '操作',
    renderType: 'options',
    getValueOf: item => {
      const actions = [
        { children: '查看', onClick: () => console.log('查看', item.id) },
        { children: '编辑', onClick: () => console.log('编辑', item.id) }
      ];
      if (item.status !== '已完成') {
        actions.push({
          children: '删除',
          isDelete: true,
          message: \`确定删除 \${item.id} 吗？\`,
          onClick: () => console.log('删除', item.id)
        });
      }
      return actions;
    }
  }
];

const BaseExample = () => {
  return (
    <Flex vertical gap={24}>
      <div style={{ color: '#666', fontSize: 13, lineHeight: 1.8 }}>
        <p>
          列配置 <code>renderType</code> 声明列的渲染方式，无需手写 <code>render</code>。内置类型：
        </p>
        <ul style={{ margin: '8px 0', paddingLeft: 20 }}>
          <li><code>main</code> — 主信息列，支持 <code>primary</code> / <code>hover</code> / <code>onClick</code></li>
          <li><code>amount</code> — 金额列，右对齐，配合 <code>format</code> 格式化</li>
          <li><code>tag</code> — 单个 Tag，<code>getValueOf</code> 返回 <code>{'{ type, text }'}</code></li>
          <li><code>status</code> — 状态 Badge，<code>getValueOf</code> 返回 <code>{'{ type, text }'}</code></li>
          <li><code>tagList</code> — 多个 Tag 列表</li>
          <li><code>list</code> — 文本列表，可用 <code>split</code> 指定分隔符</li>
          <li><code>options</code> — 操作列，<code>getValueOf</code> 返回按钮配置数组</li>
          <li><code>description</code> — 长文本描述列</li>
          <li><code>enum</code> — 枚举值映射渲染</li>
        </ul>
        <p>
          可与尺寸修饰词组合：<code>short</code> / <code>small</code> / <code>large</code>（如 <code>tag-short</code>、<code>status-small</code>、<code>main-large</code>）。
          通过 <code>getValueOf</code> 传入 render 所需数据结构，通过 <code>format</code> 做日期、金额等展示格式化。
        </p>
      </div>
      <TableView dataSource={dataSource} columns={columns} />
    </Flex>
  );
};

render(<BaseExample />);

    code: `const { TableView } = _TableView;
const { Button, Flex, Space, message } = antd;

const orderStatusMap = {

  待发货: { type: 'warning', text: '待发货' },
  已取消: { type: 'default', text: '已取消' }
};

const dataSource = [
  {
    id: 'ORD20240115001',
    customerName: '深圳市腾讯计算机系统有限公司',

    status: '待发货',
    orderDate: '2024-01-15'
  },
  {
    id: 'ORD20240115002',
    customerName: '华为技术有限公司',
    contact: '李四',
    amount: 85000,
    status: '处理中',
    orderDate: '2024-01-15'
  },
  {
    id: 'ORD20240115003',
    customerName: '阿里巴巴集团控股有限公司',
    contact: '王五',
    amount: 120000,
    status: '待发货',
    orderDate: '2024-01-14'
  },
  {
    id: 'ORD20240115004',
    customerName: '北京字节跳动科技有限公司',
    contact: '赵六',
    amount: 65000,
    status: '已完成',
    orderDate: '2024-01-13'
  },
  {
    id: 'ORD20240115005',
    customerName: '百度在线网络技术（北京）有限公司',
    contact: '钱七',
    amount: 95000,
    status: '已取消',
    orderDate: '2024-01-12'
  }
];

const columns = [
  { name: 'id', title: '订单编号', width: 180, renderType: 'small' },
  { name: 'customerName', title: '客户名称', width: 220, renderType: 'main' },
  { name: 'contact', title: '联系人', width: 100 },
  {
    name: 'amount',
    title: '订单金额(元)',
    width: 130,
    renderType: 'amount',
    format: 'number-style:decimal-maximumFractionDigits:0-useGrouping:true-suffix:元'
  },
  { name: 'orderDate', title: '下单日期', width: 120, format: 'date' },
  {
    name: 'status',
    title: '订单状态',
    width: 100,
    renderType: 'status',
    getValueOf: item => orderStatusMap[item.status] || { type: 'default', text: item.status }
  }
];

const BatchToolbar = ({ selectedRowKeys, selectedRows, clearSelectedRows, onBatchShip, onBatchExport }) => {
  const totalAmount = selectedRows.reduce((sum, item) => sum + (item.amount || 0), 0);
  return (
    <Flex justify="space-between" align="center" style={{ marginBottom: 12, padding: '12px', background: '#f5f5f5', borderRadius: 8 }}>
      <Space>
        <span>
          已选 <strong>{selectedRowKeys.length}</strong> 个订单，总金额 <strong style={{ color: '#52c41a' }}>¥{totalAmount.toLocaleString()}</strong>
        </span>
        <Button type="primary" size="small" disabled={!selectedRowKeys.length} onClick={onBatchShip}>
          批量发货
        </Button>
        <Button size="small" disabled={!selectedRowKeys.length} onClick={onBatchExport}>
          批量导出
        </Button>
        <Button size="small" disabled={!selectedRowKeys.length} onClick={clearSelectedRows}>
          清空选择
        </Button>
      </Space>
    </Flex>
  );
};

const CheckboxExample = () => {
  const { selectedRowKeys, selectedRows, getRowSelection, clearSelectedRows } = TableView.useSelectedRow({ rowKey: 'id' });

  return (
    <div>
      <div style={{ marginBottom: 8, color: '#666' }}>多选模式 useSelectedRow + getRowSelection</div>
      <BatchToolbar
        selectedRowKeys={selectedRowKeys}
        selectedRows={selectedRows}
        clearSelectedRows={clearSelectedRows}
        onBatchShip={() => {
          message.success(\`已批量发货 \${selectedRowKeys.length} 个订单\`);
          clearSelectedRows();
        }}
        onBatchExport={() => message.info(\`正在导出 \${selectedRowKeys.length} 个订单\`)}
      />
      <TableView dataSource={dataSource} columns={columns} rowSelection={getRowSelection(dataSource)} />
    </div>
  );
};

const radioColumns = [
  { name: 'id', title: '订单编号', width: 160, renderType: 'small' },
  { name: 'customerName', title: '客户名称', renderType: 'main' },
  {
    name: 'amount',
    title: '订单金额(元)',

    format: 'number-style:decimal-maximumFractionDigits:0-useGrouping:true-suffix:元'
  },
  {

    title: '订单状态',
    width: 100,
    renderType: 'status',
    getValueOf: item => orderStatusMap[item.status] || { type: 'default', text: item.status }
  }
];

const RadioExample = () => {
  const { selectedRowKeys, selectedRows, getRowSelection } = TableView.useSelectedRow({ rowKey: 'id', type: 'radio' });
  const selectedOrder = selectedRows[0];

  return (
    <div>
      <div style={{ marginBottom: 8, color: '#666' }}>
        单选模式 <code>type: 'radio'</code> — 选择列在表格最左侧
      </div>
      <div style={{ marginBottom: 12, padding: '12px', background: '#f5f5f5', borderRadius: 8 }}>
        当前选中：{selectedOrder ? \`\${selectedOrder.id}（\${selectedOrder.customerName}）\` : '无'}
      </div>
      <TableView dataSource={dataSource} columns={radioColumns} rowSelection={getRowSelection(dataSource)} />
    </div>
  );
};

const BaseExample = () => {
  return (
    <Flex vertical gap={24}>
      <CheckboxExample />
      <RadioExample />
    </Flex>
  );
};

render(<BaseExample />);

    description: `排序 Hook，配合 TableView 实现表头排序、单列/多列排序与 sortDataSource 本地排序`,
    code: `const { TableView } = _TableView;
const { Flex, Tag } = antd;
const { useMemo } = React;

const orderStatusMap = {
  已完成: { type: 'success', text: '已完成' },
  处理中: { type: 'processing', text: '处理中' },
  待发货: { type: 'warning', text: '待发货' },
  已取消: { type: 'default', text: '已取消' }
};

const dataSource = [
  { id: 'ORD001', customerName: '深圳市腾讯计算机系统有限公司', amount: 42500, status: '已完成', orderDate: '2024-01-15' },
  { id: 'ORD002', customerName: '华为技术有限公司', amount: 85000, status: '处理中', orderDate: '2024-01-14' },
  { id: 'ORD003', customerName: '阿里巴巴集团控股有限公司', amount: 120000, status: '待发货', orderDate: '2024-01-16' },
  { id: 'ORD004', customerName: '北京字节跳动科技有限公司', amount: 65000, status: '已完成', orderDate: '2024-01-13' },
  { id: 'ORD005', customerName: '百度在线网络技术（北京）有限公司', amount: 95000, status: '已取消', orderDate: '2024-01-12' }
];

const columns = [
  { name: 'id', title: '订单编号', width: 140, sort: { single: true }, renderType: 'small' },
  { name: 'customerName', title: '客户名称', width: 240, sort: true, renderType: 'main' },
  {
    name: 'amount',
    title: '订单金额(元)',
    width: 130,
    sort: true,
    renderType: 'amount',
    format: 'number-style:decimal-maximumFractionDigits:0-useGrouping:true-suffix:元'
  },
  { name: 'orderDate', title: '下单日期', width: 120, sort: true, format: 'date' },
  {
    name: 'status',
    title: '订单状态',
    width: 100,
    renderType: 'status',
    getValueOf: item => orderStatusMap[item.status] || { type: 'default', text: item.status }
  }
];

const SortState = ({ sort }) => (
  <div style={{ marginBottom: 12, padding: '12px', background: '#f5f5f5', borderRadius: 8 }}>
    当前排序：
    {sort.length ? (
      <span>
        {sort.map(item => (
          <Tag key={item.name} color="blue" style={{ marginLeft: 8 }}>
            {item.name} {item.sort}
          </Tag>
        ))}
      </span>
    ) : (
      <span style={{ marginLeft: 8, color: '#999' }}>无</span>
    )}
  </div>
);

const SingleSortExample = () => {
  const { sort, sortRender } = TableView.useSort({
    onSortChange: value => console.log('单列排序变更:', value)
  });
  const sortedData = useMemo(() => TableView.sortDataSource(dataSource, sort, columns), [sort]);

  return (
    <div>
      <div style={{ marginBottom: 8, color: '#666' }}>单列排序（订单编号 sort: {'{ single: true }'}）</div>
      <SortState sort={sort} />
      <TableView dataSource={sortedData} columns={columns} sortRender={sortRender} />
    </div>
  );
};

const MultiSortExample = () => {
  const { sort, sortRender } = TableView.useSort({
    defaultSort: [{ name: 'orderDate', sort: 'DESC' }],
    onSortChange: value => console.log('多列排序变更:', value)
  });
  const sortedData = useMemo(() => TableView.sortDataSource(dataSource, sort, columns), [sort]);

  return (
    <div>
      <div style={{ marginBottom: 8, color: '#666' }}>多列排序（默认按下单日期降序，金额/日期支持多列排序）</div>
      <SortState sort={sort} />
      <TableView dataSource={sortedData} columns={columns} sortRender={sortRender} />
    </div>
  );
};

const BaseExample = () => {
  return (
    <Flex vertical gap={24}>
      <div style={{ color: '#666', fontSize: 13 }}>
        列配置 <code>sort: true</code> 开启排序，<code>sort: {'{ single: true }'}</code> 为单列排序。点击表头三角切换 DESC → ASC → 取消。
      </div>
      <SingleSortExample />
      <MultiSortExample />
    </Flex>
  );
};

render(<BaseExample />);

    description: `表头 title 超出列宽自动省略、悬停 tooltip；单元格 ellipsis 配置基于 antd Typography 实现内容省略`,
    code: `const { TableView } = _TableView;
const { Flex, Tag } = antd;
const { useMemo } = React;

const orderStatusMap = {
  已完成: { type: 'success', text: '已完成' },
  处理中: { type: 'processing', text: '处理中' },
  待发货: { type: 'warning', text: '待发货' }
};

const dataSource = [
  {
    id: 'ORD001',
    customerName: '深圳市腾讯计算机系统有限公司深圳总部研发中心',
    remark: '客户要求春节前完成交付，需协调物流加急处理，并同步更新合同附件与验收标准说明文档。',
    amount: 42500,
    status: '待发货'
  },
  {
    id: 'ORD002',
    customerName: '华为技术有限公司坂田基地采购中心',
    remark: '项目处于需求评审阶段，待客户确认最终配置清单后安排发货。',
    amount: 85000,
    status: '处理中'
  },
  {
    id: 'ORD003',
    customerName: '阿里巴巴集团控股有限公司滨江园区',
    remark: '已完成付款，仓库正在拣货，预计两个工作日内发出第一批货物。',
    amount: 120000,
    status: '待发货'
  }
];

const columns = [
  { name: 'id', title: '订单编号（系统流水号）', width: 110, renderType: 'small' },
  {
    name: 'customerName',
    title: '客户名称（签约主体全称）',
    width: 140,
    renderType: 'main',
    ellipsis: true
  },
  {
    name: 'remark',
    title: '备注说明（内部流转备注）',
    width: 160,
    renderType: 'description',
    ellipsis: { showTitle: true }
  },
  {
    name: 'amount',
    title: '订单应付金额（含税，单位：元）',
    width: 120,
    sort: true,
    renderType: 'amount',
    format: 'number-style:decimal-maximumFractionDigits:0-useGrouping:true-suffix:元'
  },
  {
    name: 'status',
    title: '订单履约状态（业务状态）',
    width: 100,
    renderType: 'status',
    getValueOf: item => orderStatusMap[item.status] || { type: 'default', text: item.status }
  }
];

const TIP_TAG_STYLE = { marginRight: 8 };

const Tips = () => (
  <div style={{ color: '#666', fontSize: 13, lineHeight: 1.8 }}>
    <div>
      <Tag style={TIP_TAG_STYLE} color="blue">表头省略</Tag>
      列 <code>title</code> 超出列宽时自动单行省略，悬停 tooltip 显示完整标题；带排序的列同样生效，无需额外配置。
    </div>
    <div>
      <Tag style={TIP_TAG_STYLE} color="green">单元格省略</Tag>
      列配置 <code>ellipsis: true</code> 或 <code>ellipsis: {'{ showTitle: true }'}</code>，单元格内容超出时省略，悬停显示完整内容（基于 antd Typography）。
    </div>
    <div style={{ color: '#999' }}>
      本示例刻意使用较长表头与较窄列宽，便于观察省略与 tooltip 效果；可将鼠标悬停在表头或单元格上查看。
    </div>
  </div>
);

const BaseExample = () => {
  const { sort, sortRender } = TableView.useSort({});
  const sortedData = useMemo(() => TableView.sortDataSource(dataSource, sort, columns), [sort]);

  return (
    <Flex vertical gap={24}>
      <Tips />
      <TableView dataSource={sortedData} columns={columns} sortRender={sortRender} />
    </Flex>
  );
};

render(<BaseExample />);
